summary: Trust-Aware AI Interpretation testing complete. Backend: 21/22 tests PASSED (1 skipped). Frontend: All profile elements verified for 3 users with different trust levels. The interpret_profile function correctly receives trust_data and generates Hebrew one-sentence interpretations that are observational and non-punitive.
critical_code_review_comments: philos_ai.py interpret_profile function CORRECT: Accepts trust_data param, adds Hebrew trust context to prompt (lines 96-114)
routes/profile.py CORRECT: Fetches trust once via _get_field_trust(), passes to interpret_profile (lines 201, 245-248)
Trust state calculation CORRECT: <=0 restricted, <5 fragile, <15 building, >=15 stable
AI output meets requirements: Hebrew, one sentence, calm, symbolic, observational, non-punitive
All existing endpoints still working: login, field-dashboard (with ai_field_interpretation), trust endpoint

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testids verified, trust-aware text displays correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust-aware AI interpretation working correctly. Three test users available with different trust levels. AI generates meaningful Hebrew one-sentence interpretations that consider trust state. Profile page shows ai_profile_interpretation and field_trust block correctly.
